title: audiobook.library_event v1
description: An audiobook library or wishlist membership change. Item IDs are deterministic: ULID time bits from the envelope ts, random bits from the first 80 bits of sha256('provider|event|ts|book.providerId'), so re-observation and re-import are idempotent.

event.description: Open-world event kind. Core vocabulary: library-added, library-removed, wishlist-added, wishlist-removed.

book.description: Snapshot of the book as observed. The referenced audiobook.book item's ID is derived from provider|providerId.

observedAt.description: When Journey observed the change. Envelope ts is the provider's time when known (e.g. purchase/added date), else the poll time.
